Class AgisTableModel

java.lang.Object
javax.swing.table.AbstractTableModel
uno.anahata.asi.swing.AgisTableModel
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable, TableModel
public class AgisTableModel extends AbstractTableModel
A reusable table model for displaying active AI agi sessions. This model tracks the AbstractAsiContainer and provides real-time updates on session status, message count, and context usage through reactive listeners.
Author:
anahata
See Also:

    • AgisTableModel

      public AgisTableModel(@NonNull @NonNull AbstractAsiContainer asiConfig)
      Constructs a new model and registers a listener on the provided container.
      Parameters:
      asiConfig - The container to track.

  • Method Details

    • getRowCount

      public int getRowCount()

      public int getColumnCount()

      Specified by:

      public Class<?> getColumnClass(int columnIndex)

      Overrides:

    • getValueAt

      public Object getValueAt(int rowIndex, int columnIndex)

    • refresh

      public final void refresh()
      Refreshes the table model by synchronizing with the AbstractAsiContainer. This method manages the attachment and detachment of per-session listeners.

    • attachListeners

      private void attachListeners(Agi agi)
      Attaches reactive property change listeners to the given AGI session. This registers the metrics listener for properties like nickname, summary, history, resources, and current status.
      Parameters:
      agi - The AGI session to attach listeners to.

    • detachListeners

      private void detachListeners(Agi agi)
      Detaches reactive property change listeners from the given AGI session. This unregisters the metrics listener to prevent memory leaks.
      Parameters:
      agi - The AGI session to detach listeners from.

    • handleMetricsChange

      private void handleMetricsChange(PropertyChangeEvent evt)
      Handles property change events from individual sessions to update specific rows.
      Parameters:
      evt - The property change event.

    • getAgiAt

      public Agi getAgiAt(int row)
      Retrieves the agi session at the specified row index.
      Parameters:
      row - The model row index.
      Returns:
      The session, or null if the index is out of bounds.

    • handleAsiChange

      private void handleAsiChange(PropertyChangeEvent evt)
      Handles property change events from the ASI container to trigger a refresh.
      Parameters:
      evt - The property change event.

    • dispose

      public void dispose()
      Unregisters the listener from the container and cleans up the model.
